title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in Cardiovascular System - Agenda - November 28, 2014 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in Cardiovascular System - Agenda - November 28, 2014
- Place: Holland Cross, Tower B, Room 2048
- Date and time: November 28, 2014, 7:30 am to 16:00pm
- Chairperson: Dr. John Ducas
- Science Advisor: Hripsime Shahbazian
- Participants: SAC MDUCS Members, Health Canada
- Scientific & Regulatory Officers: Caroline Hunt
